description:
All your calendars in one app. iCloud, CalDAV, device, ICS. Private.
Your calendars are everywhere. Family on iCloud. Holidays from some website. Birthdays buried in your contacts. Work on the phone calendar. KashCal pulls them into one app on Android.

Learn more at https://kashcal.onekash.org

• iCloud: switched to Android but your family is still on Apple? Sync iCloud calendars directly. No bridge, no workaround.

• CalDAV: Nextcloud, Fastmail, Radicale, Baikal, Zoho, mailbox.org, Stalwart, SOGo, and more. Native two-way sync, no middleware. Your phone's Google and Outlook calendars show up too.

• Six views: month, agenda, day, 3-day, week, and year. Pinch to zoom the timeline, drag an event to reschedule it.

• Quick Add: type "Coffee with Kash tomorrow 3pm" and the event is made. Understands dates, times, recurrence, and locations.

• Scheduling: invite people, send meeting invitations, and RSVP to invites others send you.

• Insights: see where your time goes. Busiest days, back-to-back streaks, free blocks. Computed on-device.

• Widgets: keep your day on the home screen without opening the app. Agenda, date, week, month, and upcoming.

• ICS subscriptions: follow any calendar feed. Public holidays, school terms, sports seasons.

• Birthdays & anniversaries: pulled from your contacts automatically.

• Per-event colors: from a curated palette or a full color wheel, so your week reads at a glance.

• Works fully offline out of the box.

Private by default

No analytics. No telemetry. No KashCal account. We have no servers, so there is nothing to collect.

• Credentials encrypted with the Android Keystore
• App lock: hide your events behind your fingerprint, face, or screen lock

Open source under Apache-2.0. https://kashcal.onekash.org

Free as in speech. Also free as in beer.
